description: Emit the basic transfer Opentrons Protocol API v2 template (.py) into the record store.
rules: read-only — produces a local file, controls no hardware
pure Python stdlib — copies the vendored basic_protocol_template.py
writes record_store/basic_protocol.py (a ready-to-edit Flex/OT-2 transfer protocol)
usage: No vars required. Output: basic_protocol.py — edit it, then run the `simulate` perk.
limitation: Emits a static template only; it does not customize labware, pipettes, or volumes.
